name: Secondary Folder Tree
description: A second folder tree, slid in from the right of TEDI's workspace and mutual-exclusive with the AI Agent sidebar. Renders TEDI's built-in file explorer (`ctx.ui.mountFolderTree`) so icons, indentation, expand/collapse, and click-to-open match the left sidebar pixel-for-pixel. Default workspace folder; rebindable `Mod+Shift+E` shortcut.
author: IlhamRiski - ilhamriski.com
